[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111111111 a
1 1111011000 6
2 0110111110 7
3 0100001100 3
4 1010100100 4

6 0101001001 4
7 1000111011 6
